upstreams.name: Gemini API
upstreams.responsibility: Primary LLM inference and embeddings/runtime model calls.
upstreams.publicContractSurface: Gemini Generative Language API + model name contract
upstreams.supportedVersionWindow: Gemini model names declared in env contract
upstreams.rollbackPath: Restore previous env contract model set and rerun live + sidecar contract gates.

upstreams.name: OpenUI upstream reference
upstreams.responsibility: Tracked upstream reference surface used for selective adoption, compatibility review, and upstream drift visibility.
upstreams.publicContractSurface: Upstream repository/image reference plus repository compatibility projection and sync policy docs.
upstreams.supportedVersionWindow: Tracked upstream remote state and explicitly reviewed image or commit evidence only
upstreams.rollbackPath: Revert the selective adoption branch, restore prior upstream evidence, and rerun upstream governance checks.

upstreams.name: GHCR CI image
upstreams.publicContractSurface: Immutable GHCR image digest + CI container action contract
upstreams.rollbackPath: Restore previous lock digest and rerun workflow + IaC checks.

upstreams.name: Playwright browser assets
upstreams.responsibility: Browser binaries and traces used by E2E and visual checks.
upstreams.publicContractSurface: playwright package version and browser executable contract
upstreams.rollbackPath: Restore prior lockfile and rerun E2E + visual QA.

upstreams.name: Python sidecar dependencies
upstreams.supportedVersionWindow: requirements.txt pinned ranges validated by py:smoke and sidecar contract tests
upstreams.rollbackPath: Restore previous requirements.txt and rerun py:smoke + sidecar contract tests.

upstreams.name: patch-package surface
upstreams.responsibility: Temporary third-party dependency overrides applied postinstall.
upstreams.publicContractSurface: patch-package registry and postinstall replay contract
upstreams.supportedVersionWindow: Only patches declared in patch registry
upstreams.rollbackPath: Delete patch entry + patch file together and rerun upstream governance.

upstreams.name: Upstream sync remotes
upstreams.responsibility: Source alignment with upstream remote and replay workflow.
upstreams.publicContractSurface: Canonical upstream remote URL + sync branch policy + init/check scripts
upstreams.supportedVersionWindow: Canonical upstream remote must resolve and pass init/check policy
upstreams.rollbackPath: Reset remote URL to previous canonical target and rerun init/check.
